# Core Dependencies
python >= 3.9

# JSON Schema & JSON-LD
jsonschema >= 4.17.0
pyld >= 2.1
rdflib >= 6.2.0

# Pydantic for data validation
pydantic >= 2.0.0
pydantic-core >= 2.0.0

# FastAPI for validator API (Week 3-4)
fastapi >= 0.100.0
uvicorn >= 0.23.0
httpx >= 0.24.0

# Testing
pytest >= 7.4.0
pytest-cov >= 4.1.0
pytest-asyncio >= 0.21.0
pytest-mock >= 3.11.0

# Code Quality
black >= 23.7.0
flake8 >= 6.0.0
mypy >= 1.4.0
isort >= 5.12.0

# Documentation
sphinx >= 7.0.0
sphinx-rtd-theme >= 1.3.0

# Development
python-dotenv >= 1.0.0
rich >= 13.5.0

# Optional: Performance monitoring
opentelemetry-api >= 1.19.0
opentelemetry-sdk >= 1.19.0
